name: deskreen
description: Deskreen turns any device with a web browser into a secondary screen for your computer. ⭐️ Star to support our work!
readme_summary: Deskreen CE is an Electron.js application that allows users to turn any device with a web browser into a secondary screen for their computer. It utilizes WebRTC for live screen sharing and supports Windows, macOS, and Linux.
key_features: Turns any device with a web browser into a secondary screen
Uses WebRTC for live screen streaming
Screen sharing to multiple devices (mentioned in topics)
primary_use_case: Extending a computer's display to other devices wirelessly using a web browser.
cover_image_prompt: A magical, glowing portal opens from a laptop screen, projecting a vibrant, live replica of the laptop's display onto a tablet and a smartphone held by a person in a cozy home office. The portal is made of shimmering data streams and subtle WebRTC icons. The person looks delighted, interacting with the projected screen as if it were a physical extension. Small, almost imperceptible code snippets float around the edges of the scene, hinting at the underlying technology. The overall mood is one of seamless connectivity and enhanced productivity. 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and soft, inviting lighting.

name: arcada
description: 📐 react & pixi.js interior design software / floor plan creator
readme_summary: Arcada is an open-source, web-based interior design and floor plan creation software. It allows users to draw walls, add doors and windows, place furniture, and measure spaces accurately to scale, with support for multiple floors and saving/loading designs.
primary_use_case: Creating and visualizing interior floor plans and designs.
cover_image_prompt: A digital architect, depicted as a friendly character, standing in a minimalist, brightly lit studio. They are holding a glowing blueprint that is magically transforming into a detailed, 3D floor plan of a house, complete with walls, doors, windows, and furniture. Small, subtle UI elements resembling the Arcada interface float around the architect, showing tools like wall placement and furniture selection. Data particles flow from the blueprint to a nearby screen displaying a saved design. The overall style is a clean, 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and a bright, inviting color palette.

name: page-agent
description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
readme_summary: Page Agent is a JavaScript library that allows users to control web interfaces using natural language. It integrates directly into the webpage, eliminating the need for browser extensions or external tools, and enables text-based DOM manipulation powered by user-provided LLMs.
key_features: No browser extension or headless browser required
Optional Chrome extension for multi-page tasks
Optional MCP Server to control browser from outside
primary_use_case: Enabling users to control web interfaces with natural language, making web applications more accessible and automating complex workflows like form filling and SaaS AI copilot integration.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic 'Page Agent' character, depicted as a helpful guide made of glowing code and UI elements, standing on a webpage. The agent is holding a speech bubble containing a natural language command like 'Book a flight'. Below the speech bubble, a series of intuitive icons representing flight booking steps (search, select, confirm) are being automatically clicked and filled in by digital tendrils extending from the agent. The background shows a simplified, clean representation of a web browser interface with subtle digital particles flowing around the agent. The overall mood is helpful and futuristic, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a bright, inviting color palette.

name: webnovel-writer
description: 基于 Claude Code 的长篇网文辅助创作系统，解决 AI 写作中的「遗忘」和「幻觉」问题，支持 200 万字量级 连载创作。
readme_summary: Webnovel Writer is a Python-based system designed to assist in writing long-form web novels using Claude Code. It addresses common AI writing issues like memory loss and hallucinations by managing plot points, character settings, and world-building rules, enabling continuous serialization of up to 2 million characters without contradictions.
key_features: Manages character settings, plot points, and world-building rules
Solves AI 'forgetting' and 'hallucination' issues in long-form writing
Supports serialization of up to 2 million characters
Integrates with Claude Code via a plugin
Provides commands for planning, writing, reviewing, and dashboard visualization
Story System with state management and commit projections
primary_use_case: AI-assisted long-form web novel writing, ensuring consistency and coherence over extended narratives.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously organizing a vast, infinite library. Each book represents a chapter, and the librarian uses glowing threads of light to connect plot points, character arcs, and world-building elements across shelves, preventing any book from being misplaced or its contents forgotten. Small, subtle holographic screens around the librarian display snippets of text and character profiles. The overall mood is one of order and creative control amidst immense scale. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette and clear, defined elements.

name: CyberStrikeAI
description: CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.
readme_summary: CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go, designed to automate and enhance cybersecurity testing. It integrates over 100 security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, and AI agents to manage the entire security testing lifecycle, from vulnerability discovery to reporting.
key_features: Role-based testing with predefined security roles
Skills system with specialized testing skills
Native MCP protocol and AI agents
End-to-end automation from conversational commands to vulnerability discovery
Auditable, traceable, and collaborative testing environment
AI decision engine with OpenAI-compatible models
primary_use_case: Automating and orchestrating comprehensive security testing and vulnerability management through an AI-driven platform.
cover_image_prompt: A master alchemist in a futuristic laboratory, meticulously combining various glowing vials and ancient scrolls (representing 100+ security tools) into a complex, shimmering elixir (representing automated vulnerability discovery and attack chains). The alchemist uses an AI-powered interface, depicted as a holographic projection showing intricate data flows and decision trees, to guide the process. The output is a clear, glowing shield that repels shadowy digital threats. Subtle UI elements showing code snippets and vulnerability reports are integrated into the lab's consoles. The scene is set in a dimly lit, high-tech environment with a focus on the alchemist and the central reaction. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a dark, sophisticated color palette and glowing accents.
